title: More Creations
description:
Adds some paintings and music disc made
You can upload paintings/music disc to this mod
body:
Adds Paintings and Music disc made by you (and me!)


<details>
<summary>Paintings list</summary>
  
Cave - by PigGold16 (Me)

Dragon - by PigGold16 (Me)
   
Hell - by PigGold16 (Me)
  
Minecraft - by PigGold16 (Me)

Portal - by PigGold16 (Me)

Snow - by PigGold16 (Me)

Tree - by PigGold16 (Me)

Update - by PigGold16 (Me)

Village - by PigGold16 (Me)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Music Disc List</summary>

There doesn't seem to be anything here... :(

</details>

If you want to upload your painting/music disc you can do this here: [Click Me!](https://forms.gle/hKLT74DxFSSWf32C9)
